description: claudestarter workflow - registry-backed DRY component development.
rules: Read src/registry.json before proposing a new component, hook, or util.
Prefer extending an existing component with a new variant over creating a new file.
Never suggest a filename like Foo2.tsx, FooNew.tsx, or ConfirmModal when Modal exists.
After you create or modify a component, remind the user to run: npm run component:register <Name> <path>
Keep the <!-- REGISTRY:START --> block in CLAUDE.md in sync by calling: npm run docs:generate
